staged_emails.subject: A note from Clarion
staged_emails.body:
Hi Sarah,

I noticed a pattern in Johnson Family Law's recent client reviews - about 8 complaints specifically around communication responsiveness in the past 3 months. As firms grow (I see you've added 3 attorneys in 2025), these feedback patterns often only become visible after they've already affected multiple clients.

Clarion converts your public client reviews into a weekly governance brief that surfaces these patterns early - classified by theme and structured as specific partner action items.

I'd be glad to walk you through how it works using a sample of your actual public reviews. Would you have 20 minutes this week?

Best,
James
